heading: Indian liability waiver
label: 10235 Indian liability waiver
text: Where a State does not have an adequate forum to enforce grant provisions imposing liability on Indian tribes, the Assistant Attorney General is authorized to waive State liability and may pursue such legal remedies as are necessary.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 3789 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.l
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 810 and is classified to .section 816 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10229 of this title
